name: Eastwood Park
description: Eastwood Park is a place to play pickleball in Plainview, MN. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Underwood Park
description: Underwood Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lake City, MN. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
